name: Arpan Chaudhary
biography: Cricket is not just a sport but a lifestyle for me. From gully cricket to being the captain of the high school team and going forward to play in a corporate league in Delhi, I finally landed up with CCC. We left our home, our country, friends, and family behind, but one thing that stayed in my heart was cricket and the passion to play this amazing game.

name: Sankalp Prakash
biography: I discovered my true passion for cricket when I started playing for Michigan State University in the USA. Cricket helped me find the balance I was looking to achieve in my personal life and gave me a home in the USA.

name: Aditya Andhare
biography: I started off as a top-order batsman in school cricket and turned into more of a bowler after I discovered the swing in my bowling.

name: Rohit Vibhu
biography: I'm an all-rounder and cricket lover. I enjoy playing both batting and bowling and have a passion for the sport. Cricket is more than just a game for me; it's a way of life.

name: Anish Rane
biography: I have played cricket ever since I can remember; I started off as a wicketkeeper in my younger days and then switched to an all-rounder!

name: Karan Kapoor
biography: A lifelong athlete getting back to playing cricket professionally after a decade-long break and moving across the planet A dominant all-rounder working on his game, dusting off the rust, and trying to make an eventual push in the growing pro cricket scene in the USA.

name: Nitant Kakar
biography: Represented the American college cricket team against the Canadian college cricket team in 2018.

name: Asfandyar malik
biography: represented the American college cricket team against the Canadian college cricket team in 2018.
